title: Geepas 450W Rice Cooker & Steamer with Keep Warm Function, 1L | Automatic Cooking, Non-Stick Inner Pot | Make Rice & Steam Healthy Vegetables | Includes Measuring Cup, Spatula & Detachable Power Cord
features: ✅3-IN-1 FUNCTIONS (Cook, Steam, Keep Warm), ACCESSORIES - This pot features three different functions namely cook, steam and keep warm. Perfect for cooking all types of rice - including Arborio, jasmine, white, basmati, long grain and more. Ideal for family dining, batch cooking and meal prepping. Create fluffy rice dishes hassle-free! The rice cooker also comes with a measuring cup to ensure you always get your portions right & a spatula for serving.

✅KEEP-WARM FUNCTION, SMART STEAM – The rice cooker switches automatically into keep-warm mode as soon as the rice has cooked, ensuring deliciously fresh rice for long hours and the 2-light indicator on the front of the machine will indicate when the rice is either being cooked or being kept warm. The steamer function can be used for steaming fresh fish to freshly steamed vegetables ready to accompany the beef stew.

✅NO BURNING, SIMPLE TO USE, EASY CLEAN NON-STICK INNER POT – Rice does not burn thanks to the non-stick coated inner pot. Because cooking rice shouldn't be harder than pressing a button. The inner pot is made from a non-stick material making it super easy to clean and maintain. Make healthy family meals without hassle using this versatile Geepas Multi Cooker, which will rapidly cook your favorite foods. Your one stop solution for perfectly cooked, delicious meals every time!

✅GLASS LID, 2 YEAR WARRANTY- This rice cooker has a sturdy glass lid with stainless-steel rim that fixes it into place. It does not get smoky and lets you watch your rice as they are being cooked. Its compact design also makes it easy to store away or fit on any counter-top, making it ideal for smaller kitchens.

✅NOT JUST RICE! – The beauty of this product is that it is multi-functional. This rice cooker allows you to cook chilli's, stews, casseroles, risottos too, giving you the ultimate flexibility come dinner time.
description: Product Description ONE TOUCH OPERATION Cook perfect rice effortlessly with one-touch operation, making mealtime simple, fast, and hassle-free. GLASS LID The sturdy glass lid with a stainless-steel rim locks securely in place, ensuring safe and efficient rice cooking. 3 IN 1 FUNCTIONS Enjoy versatile cooking with this pot featuring three functions—cook, steam, and keep warm for perfect meals every time. DURABLE CONSTRUCTION Cook safely with cool-touch handles and nonslip feet, perfect for busy kitchens and hassle-free meal prep. COOK & KEEP WARM Effortlessly cook perfect rice with Cook & Warm modes, ensuring fluffy, ready-to-serve meals every time. OVERHEAT PROTECTION Designed for safety, this appliance features reliable overheat protection for hassle-free use every time. AUTOMATIC COOKING Cook all types of rice effortlessly – Arborio, jasmine, basmati, long grain, white, and more with ease. EASY TO CLEAN This compact cooker comes with removable attachments, making it effortless to clean and maintain after every use.
